sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 팔란티어는 1분기 매출이 전년 대비 39% 성장하며 시장 기대를 상회했고, 연간 매출 가이던스를 상향 조정했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 1분기 총 매출은 전년 대비 39% 증가한 8억 8,400만 달러를 기록하며 시장 기대치를 상회했습니다.
미국 시장의 강력한 수요에 힘입어 2025년 연간 총 매출 성장률 가이던스를 36%로 상향 조정했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 100만 달러 이상의 계약 139건, 500만 달러 이상의 계약 51건을 체결하며 대형 고객 기반을 확대했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: GAAP 기준 영업이익은 1억 7,600만 달러(마진 20%), 조정 영업이익은 3억 9,100만 달러(마진 44%)를 기록했습니다.
조정 잉여현금흐름은 3억 7,000만 달러로 42%의 마진율을 보였으며, GAAP 주당순이익(EPS)은 0.08달러입니다.
미국 정부 부문 매출은 전년 대비 45% 성장한 3억 7,300만 달러를 기록했습니다.

watchItems.text: 미국 상업용 부문의 68% 성장 가이던스 달성 여부와 대형 계약 체결 속도가 지속될지 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a2025q1ex991pressrelease.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Palantir Reports Q1 2025 Revenue Growth of 39% Y/Y, U.S. Revenue Growth of 55% Y/Y; Raises FY 2025 Revenue Guidance to 36% Y/Y Growth and U.S. Comm Revenue Guidance to 68% Y/Y, Crushing Consensus Expectations 5/5/2025 DENVER — (BUSINESS WIRE) — Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) today announced financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2025. “Our Rule of 40 score increased to 83% in the last quarter, once again breaking the metric. We are in the middle of a tectonic shift in the adoption of our software, particularly in the U.S. where our revenue soared 55% year-over-year, while our U.S. commercial revenue expanded 71% year-over-year in the first quarter to surpass a one-billion-dollar annual run rate,” said Alexander C. Karp, co-founder and chief executive officer of Palantir Technologies. “We are d

elivering the operating system for the modern enterprise in the era of AI. Consequently, we are raising our full-year guidance for total revenue growth to 36% and our guidance for U.S. commercial revenue growth to 68%.” Q1 2025 Highlights • U.S. revenue grew 55% year-over-year and 13% quarter-over-quarter to $628 million ◦ U.S. commercial revenue grew 71% year-over-year and 19% quarter-over-quarter to $255 million ◦ U.S. government revenue grew 45% year-over-year and 9% quarter-over-quarter to $373 million • Revenue grew 39% year-over-year and 7% quarter-over-quarter to $884 million • Closed 139 deals of at least $1 million, 51 deals of at least $5 million, a  Normalized numeric aliases: $628 million = 6억 2,800만 달러; $255 million = 2억 5,500만 달러; $373 million = 3억 7,300만 달러; $884 million = 8억 8,400만 달러; $1 million = 100만 달러; $5 million = 500만 달러; $10 million = 1,000만 달러; $810 million = 8억 1,000만 달러; $628 = 628달러; $5 = 5달러; $884 = 884달러; $1 = 1달러; $10 = 10달러; $810 = 810달러; $2.32 = 2.32달러.

er-year and 30% quarter-over-quarter • Customer count grew 39% year-over-year and 8% quarter-over-quarter • GAAP income from operations of $176 million, representing a 20% margin • Adjusted income from operations of $391 million, representing a 44% margin • Rule of 40 score of 83% • GAAP net income of $214 million, representing a 24% margin • Cash from operations of $310 million, representing a 35% margin • Adjusted free cash flow of $370 million, representing a 42% margin • GAAP earnings per share (“EPS”) of $0.08 • Adjusted EPS of $0.13 • Cash, cash equivalents, and short-term U.S. Treasury securit  Normalized numeric aliases: $176 million = 1억 7,600만 달러; $391 million = 3억 9,100만 달러; $214 million = 2억 1,400만 달러; $310 million = 3억 1,000만 달러; $370 million = 3억 7,000만 달러; $5.4 billion = 54억 달러; $176 = 176달러; $391 = 391달러; $310 = 310달러; 883,855 million = 8,838억 5,500만 달러; $0.08 = 0.08달러; $0.13 = 0.13달러; $5.4 = 5.4달러; 176,048 million = 1,760억 4,800만 달러; 390,710 million = 3,907억 1,000만 달러.
